description_long: This apartment building features a modern, rectangular design with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is clad in a combination of light gray and natural wood-toned panels, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. Two prominent balconies are visible on the front, each with glass railings and minimalistic decor, while small landscaped areas with white-leaved trees flank the main entrance. The building appears to be divided into multiple units, each with its own entrance and private outdoor space. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall aesthetic is clean, contemporary, and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, rectangular apartment building with wood and gray paneling, large windows, and two front balconies. The design is symmetrical and contemporary, with landscaped entryways and private outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two balconies with glass railings, large windows, and landscaped areas with white trees.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the building, individual unit entrances, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wood-paneled facade, minimal windows, and no balconies or landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's length, side entrances, and the continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in pairs and groups, with large panes on the front facade and smaller, more spaced windows on the sides and rear. The alignment is horizontal and consistent across both floors.
